data_formats: Widely used file formats (Spreadsheet, JSON, GeoJSON, SHP, GPX, KML, XML, TIFF, MP3, MP4, etc.)
name: LAMASUS Land Use Management Data Set
data_ownership: Created, compiled, and maintained by the LAMASUS research consortium, which includes multiple European research institutions.
spatial_details: The dataset provides a ~1 km spatially gridded European coverage, with additional outputs aggregated at NUTS2 administrative regions for policy and reporting applications.
access_barrier: No, direct download/access through a web link
documentation_list: See, L., Romanchuk, Z., Yashchun, O., & Malek, Ž. (2024). The LUM Geodatabase and Area Estimates of Land Use Change to 2018 (Deliverable D2.1). LAMASUS Project (EU Horizon 2020). Available at: https://www.lamasus.eu/wp-content/uploads/LAMASUS_D2.1_LUMGeodatabase.pdf
